types.name: fuzziness
types.description: Controls the fuzziness level for fuzzy search queries. Fuzziness means the number of character changes (insertions, deletions, substitutions) needed to transform one word into another.

enumValues.name: NONE
enumValues.description: No fuzziness is applied, it is set to 0. Note that all other parameters will be disregarded if sent.

enumValues.name: AUTO
enumValues.description: Automatically selects fuzziness based on term length: 0 for 1-2 characters, 1 for 3-5 characters, 2 for >5 characters
